description: Fix 7 issues identified in the code review: 5 missing variable declarations causing runtime crashes, async IIFE inside state updater anti-pattern, and missing preview mode guards on undo/redo/z-order operations.
steps: Step 1: Re-add `const source = workspaces.find(w => w.id === wsId)` in duplicateWorkspace after the preview guard
Step 2: Re-add `const target = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)` in cloneNode after the preview guard
Step 3: Re-add `const target = nodes.find(n => n.id === nodeId)` in cloneNodeToWorkspace after the preview guard
Step 4: Re-add `const task = prev.find(t => t.id === taskId)` inside the setTasks updater in deleteTask
Step 5: Re-add `const currentWorkspaces = workspaces` in the workspace auto-save effect
Step 6: Refactor toggleAppMode to move async hydration outside the state updater
Step 7: Add isPreviewMode guards to performUndo, performRedo, bringToFront, and sendToBack
acceptance_criteria: duplicateWorkspace does not throw ReferenceError for source
cloneNode does not throw ReferenceError for target
cloneNodeToWorkspace does not throw ReferenceError for target
deleteTask does not throw ReferenceError for task
Workspace auto-save effect does not crash on currentWorkspaces reference
toggleAppMode does not run async side effects inside state updater
performUndo, performRedo, bringToFront, sendToBack are gated in preview mode
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run npm run build and confirm exit code is 0
